word: G2236 - ἥδιστα - hḗdista - hay'-dis-tah - Most gladly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἥδιστα

- Transliteration: hedista

- Phonetic: hay'-dis-tah

- Definition:

1. most gladly

- Origin: plural of the superlative of the same as G2234

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter plural of the superlative of the same as G2234; with great pleasure: - most (very) gladly.
